name: branchbrief
description: Local-first branch review briefs for humans and AI reviewers.

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --strict --types node --rewriteRelativeImportExtensions --outDir dist src/cli.ts src/index.ts src/types.ts src/config/*.ts src/errors/*.ts src/git/*.ts src/output/*.ts src/risk/*.ts src/verification/*.ts
scripts.typecheck: tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --strict --types node --rewriteRelativeImportExtensions --noEmit src/cli.ts src/index.ts src/types.ts src/config/*.ts src/errors/*.ts src/git/*.ts src/output/*.ts src/risk/*.ts src/verification/*.ts tests/**/*.ts
scripts.test: node --test tests/cli/*.test.mjs tests/config/*.test.mjs tests/github/*.test.mjs tests/risk/*.test.mjs tests/git/*.test.ts tests/output/*.test.ts tests/verification/*.test.ts tests/integration/*.test.mjs
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm test && npm run typecheck && npm run build && git diff --check
